mapper.select: SELECT inquiry_id AS inquiryId, user_id AS userId, title AS title, content AS content, answer AS answer, inquiry_status AS inquiryStatus, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM inquiries WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY inquiry_id DESC

SELECT inquiry_id AS inquiryId, user_id AS userId, title AS title, content AS content, answer AS answer, inquiry_status AS inquiryStatus, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM inquiries WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiryId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiries ( user_id, title, content, inquiry_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, 'WAITING', NOW() )
